untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) momentum divergence on primary and higher timeframes—no multi-timeframe divergence indicator available; (2) price overextension measurement on higher timeframes—no overextension metric in allowed indicators; (3) three-leg pattern formation recognition—no pattern detection indicator available. These represent qualitative structural analyses not expressible with the allowed indicator set. Substituted MACD momentum and ADX trend strength as proxies for momentum confirmation, but cannot encode the counter-trend precondition checks (divergence/overextension) as specified.
translation_notes: CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction implemented with separate entry_long and entry_short conditions. Used MACD histogram crossing zero and ADX > 25 to approximate momentum confirmation. Price higher highs/lows approximated with close > prev_close and structure breaks with close < prev_low. Cannot implement the explicit momentum divergence disqualification or higher timeframe overextension checks without multi-timeframe or divergence detection capability.
